create.title: Share a secret securely
create.lead: Encrypt text or a file directly in your browser. The key never leaves this browser.
create.placeholder: What do you want to share?
create.advancedLead: These fields are optional. Recommendation: use a passphrase when sending the link over an untrusted channel like email.
create.passphraseHelp: Adds an extra encryption layer. The recipient then needs both the URL AND the passphrase. Send the passphrase via a separate channel (phone, Signal, Threema).
create.notifyHelp: We'll notify you at this address once the secret has been retrieved. Neither content nor the link is included — only a timestamp and an anonymised IP hash.
create.hintLabel: Hint for the recipient (visible before decryption)
create.hintHelp: Short text shown to the recipient before they open the secret. Useful for context, e.g. "Login customer system X". Don't put anything confidential here — the hint is stored unencrypted.
create.resultLead: Copy the link and send it to the recipient. The key in the URL fragment (#…) never leaves this browser.
create.mailBody:
Hi,

you can retrieve the secret I shared with you via this link:

{url}

{expiresLine}{burnLine}{passphraseLine}
The link was created with SharePassword (https://secret.bytexx.de) — end-to-end encrypted, the server cannot read its content.

Best regards

-- 
BYTEXX IT — Your IT consulting and services partner
Inh. Rico Becker
Albert-Einstein-Str. 18
23617 Stockelsdorf, Germany

Phone:   +49 (0) 40 209 339 559
Mobile:  +49 (0) 172 675 059 6
E-Mail:  info@bytexx.de
Web:     https://bytexx.de
create.mailBurn: The link only works once — whoever opens it after you sees nothing.
create.mailPassphrase: You'll also need the passphrase I'm sending you through a separate channel.
create.error.empty: Please enter text or attach a file.
create.error.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again in a moment.
view.title: View secret
view.passphrasePrompt: This secret is protected by a passphrase.
view.burnedNote: This secret has been deleted and cannot be retrieved again.
view.error.locked: Too many failed attempts. Try again later.
